title: Stainless Steel Auto Self Mixing Rechargeable Self Stirring Coffee Mug, Suitble for Coffee/Tea/Chocolate/Kitchen/Travel/Home (Brown)
description:
About this item
Premium Quality: Self-stirring mug is made of food-grade stainless steel, which is safe and durable; strong stirrer completely dissolves powders within a minute, no more spoon for stirring; convenient for making coffee, milk, tea and other beverage.
Exquisite Design: Self-stirring coffee mug is equipped with spill-free lid, taking drink with you; powerful built-in magnetic device and stirrer ensure smooth and strong stirring; rechargeable mug for convenience.
Electric Mixing Cup: The automatic mixing cup is the best and easiest way to mix hot or cold drinks! mixing cups with lids allow you to take bever
Safe Material: The inner wall of the 380ml coffee mixing cup is 304 stainless steel, the outer shell is ABS plastic, and the bottom battery cover is silica gel, which is stable and non-slip, healthy and hygienic
How to use: press button to start stirring and press again to stop; magnetic stirrer can be removed for easy cleaning; use USB cable to charge HISET auto magnetic mug.
Ideal gift: perfect present for birthday, party, anniversaries, Valentine’s Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas and other gift giving festivals and occasions. Portable and practical in home, hotel, office, patio, restaurant, café and others.
Package: 1x 12.8 oz magnetic stirring mug; 1x micro-USB charging cable
reviews_1s: Do not buy!!! Stopped working after couple months. Does not have batteries at the bottom like shown in the advertisement!I am super disappointed with this item. I ordered the white/grey color & I received the brown color. They sent the wrong color item twice and I am unable to request a replacement & the seller has not responded to my feedback. Also, the interior is smaller than the actual size of the cup (almost like the electronic charging piece takes up a portion of the bottom space. The stirrer is also not that great because it still leaves residue/un-stirred contents at the bottom. There should also be an opening for a straw or sip area in the top cap cover. This is a great idea but poorly executed. Also the price is wrong, they are different prices for the same 1 mug (just different colors). I would not recommend.lo sigo usando solo por el diseño pero por que es electrico no porque no es lo que dicen que se bate soloIt's weak and won't mix protein powder
